metadata.description: Multi-agent orchestration for coding CLIs in tmux — spawn, dispatch, and wait on Claude Code, Codex, Kimi, OpenCode, and Gemini workers from one terminal.

plugins.name: orchestmux
plugins.description: Coordinate several coding agents at once. Workers run as real tmux panes you can watch and take over; every dispatched task carries a reporting protocol so the coordinator blocks on actual completion instead of guessing from terminal output. Requires the `orchestmux` CLI (npm i -g orchestmux) and tmux.
